selected_tasks.expected_evidence: Command output shows the actionable suggestion verbatim Future users who run `deepseek cache-report` know their next step without reading documentation Implementation Notes: Find the cache-report rendering code in `src/commands_deepseek.rs` (around line 2068 based on grep) The current message says "yoagent's Usage struct drops DeepSeek cache token fields" —
